step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("has AZD9668 been tested in clinical trials")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First write up to two sentences analyzing the retrieved evidence in relation to the initial claim. Then give your final answer choice using \boxed{X} format.
After retrieving updated evidence on AZD9668, I observe that despite extensive coverage of numerous drugs—including deucravacitinib, baricitinib, nirogacestat, selonsertib, and several kinase inhibitors—all entries explicitly reference either completed phase III trials, FDA approvals, or detailed clinical investigation protocols. Notably, no document mentions AZD968, nor does any description describe its involvement in any clinical setting or research protocol. Given that all discussed therapeutics are tied to defined trial phases or regulatory milestones, the absence of any record related to AZD9668 strongly reinforces the earlier finding that it lacks documented clinical evaluation.
\boxed{\text{B}}
